lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: What could you want with an old woman like me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am in search of a quest.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Hmmm... Maybe I can think of something for you.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Would you like to become more proficient in the dark arts?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, help me become one with my darker side.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Okay, I'm going to make a potion to help bring out your darker self.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: You will need certain ingredients.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I need?

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: You need an eye of newt, a rat's tail, an onion... Oh and a piece of burnt meat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, I'll go and get them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I have my principles and honour.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Suit yourself, but you're missing out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard that you are a witch.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Yes it does seem to be getting fairly common knowledge.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: I fear I may be getting a visit from the witch hunters of Falador before long.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

sections.title: Talking to Hetty with none of the items

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been looking for those ingredients.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: So what have you found so far?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't have any of them yet.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Well I can't make the potion without them! Remember... You need an eye of newt, a rat's tail, an onion, and a piece of burnt meat. Off you go dear!

sections.title: Talking to Hetty with some of the items

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: So what have you found so far?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I don't have any burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Great, but I'll need the other ingredients as well.

sections.title: Talking to Hetty with all the items

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been looking for those ingredients.

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: So what have you found so far?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In fact I have everything!

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Excellent, can I have them then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, is it ready?

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Ok, now drink from the cauldron.

sections.title: Talking to Hetty again before drinking from the cauldron

lines.speaker: Hetty
lines.text: Well are you going to drink the potion or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I will.
